_groups.Core tokens | Resolved color tokens: High-level semantic color aliases. Each resolves to the matching palette source token and adapts automatically between light and dark mode. Start here when applying your brand palette.
_groups.Core tokens | action: Semantic action-color scale derived from --sf-color-action. Covers fills, hover/active states, and ghost variants for primary interactive elements.
_groups.Core tokens | base: Semantic base-color scale derived from --sf-color-base. Covers fills, hover/active states, and ghost variants for secondary interactive elements.
_groups.Core tokens | primary: Semantic primary-color scale derived from --sf-color-primary. Covers fills, hover/active states, and ghost variants for the primary palette role.
_groups.Core tokens | neutral: Semantic neutral-color scale derived from --sf-color-neutral. Useful for muted UI chrome.
_groups.Core tokens | BRAND COLORS (-light sourc: OKLCH lightness source tokens for each brand role. Animating these drives smooth color-scheme transitions without re-painting every dependent token.
_groups.Core tokens | STATUS COLORS (-light sour: OKLCH lightness sources for status colors (danger, error, info, success, warning). Same animation mechanism as brand light tokens.
_groups.Core tokens | DARK SOURCE TOKENS (-dark,: OKLCH dark source tokens for brand and status colors. Registered as typed <color> so scoped [data-theme="dark"] sections inherit correct absolute values rather than an unresolved var() text string.
_groups.Core tokens | Status triplets: Three-shade status triplets (subtle / muted / strong) for each status role. Use subtle for backgrounds, muted for fills, strong for text on light surfaces.
_groups.Core tokens | Text: Semantic text colors for every content role. All tokens adapt to light and dark mode automatically.
_groups.Core tokens | Surfaces: Background surface tokens from page-level to raised cards. Layer these to communicate visual depth.
_groups.Core tokens | Borders: Semantic border colors for dividers, component edges, and focus indicators.
_groups.Core tokens | Border alpha tokens: Semi-transparent border variants for overlays and glass-morphism effects.
_groups.Core tokens | Links: Colors and text-decoration properties for hyperlinks in every interactive state.
_groups.Core tokens | Selection & backdrop: Absolute reference colors and overlay tints for selections, marks, and backdrops.
_groups.Core tokens | Interactive states: Background fills for generic interactive states (hover, focus, active, selected, disabled). Apply to any element that needs state feedback.
_groups.Core tokens | Text-on-color: Accessible foreground colors guaranteed to pass WCAG contrast on each colored background surface.
_groups.Core tokens | Focus / form colors: Focus ring and form caret colors. Centralised here so keyboard navigation is consistently styled.
_groups.Core tokens | Spacing: Fluid spacing scale from 0 to 4xl. Prefer these tokens over raw values to keep the rhythm consistent across breakpoints.
_groups.Core tokens | Spacing aliases: Named semantic aliases over the spacing scale (component padding, section gap, etc.) for common layout patterns.
_groups.Core tokens | Font families: Font family stacks for every typographic role. Override these to swap typefaces without touching individual text styles.
_groups.Core tokens | Font weights: Numeric font-weight scale plus named aliases for common roles.
_groups.Core tokens | Font sizes: Fluid font-size scale. Values interpolate between mobile and desktop sizes, so prefer these over fixed rem values.
_groups.Core tokens | Line heights & letter spac: Typographic fine-tuning tokens: leading (line-height) and tracking (letter-spacing) for every weight class.
_groups.Core tokens | TYPOGRAPHY ALIASES: Part of the per-style typography bundle for a named text role (body, code, heading, h1–h6, display). The full bundle spans font-family, size, weight, line-height, and letter-spacing across related tokens.
_groups.Core tokens | Border radius: Border-radius scale from xs hairline to full circle. Stick to this scale so UI elements share a consistent curvature language.
_groups.Core tokens | Border shorthands: Ready-to-use border shorthand values (width + style + color) for the three most common border weights.
_groups.Core tokens | Border widths: Raw border-width values. Use the shorthands above unless you need to override just the width.
_groups.Core tokens | Stroke widths: SVG stroke-width scale for icons and illustrations.
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow: Base shadow opacity and glow tint. --sf-shadow-strength auto-increases in dark mode to compensate for dark surfaces; --sf-shadow-glow-color sets the glow tint (defaults to primary).
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow ramp: Elevation box-shadow ramp (none, xs–2xl, inner) plus text-shadow and drop-shadow presets. All opacity values scale with --sf-shadow-strength so dark-mode boost is automatic.
_groups.Core tokens | Opacity: Opacity tokens for specific UI states: --sf-opacity-disabled dims non-interactive elements; --sf-state-pending-opacity dims elements in an async/loading state.
_groups.Core tokens | INTERACTION STATE FLAGS: Integer flags toggled by JS or CSS :has() to drive numeric branching in calc() expressions. Set to 1 to activate the state; 0 is the default off state.
_groups.Core tokens | Text shadows: Text-shadow and drop-shadow (filter) presets. Drop-shadows respect alpha edges — prefer them over box-shadow for SVGs and cut-out images.
_groups.Core tokens | Gradients: Pre-built gradient shorthands for brand fills and directional fade effects.
_groups.Core tokens | Blur & opacity: Backdrop-filter blur scale and background-opacity tokens.
_groups.Core tokens | Animation presets: Complete animation shorthand values — pair named @keyframes with duration and easing. Use directly as animation property values.
_groups.Core tokens | Motion & easing: Duration and easing tokens. Build all transitions and animations from these to ensure consistent motion across the system.
_groups.Core tokens | Transition shorthands: Pre-built transition shorthand values for the most common animated properties.
_groups.Core tokens | Icon sizes: Standard icon sizes tied to the type scale.
_groups.Core tokens | UI sizes: Fixed sizes for interactive components (buttons, inputs, chips) at S / M / L.
_groups.Core tokens | Containers: Max-width container tokens for page-level layout.
_groups.Core tokens | Section padding: Vertical padding for full-width page sections at each responsive tier.
_groups.Core tokens | Aspect ratios: Named aspect-ratio values for images, video embeds, and card thumbnails.
_groups.Core tokens | Z-index: Z-index scale using named layers. Never use raw numbers — always reference a token from this scale.
_groups.Core tokens | Layout & a11y: Focus ring, header height, sticky offset, touch-target, text-contrast knobs, and device safe-area insets. These govern keyboard accessibility, scroll behaviour, and adaptive contrast globally.
_groups.Core tokens | Object fit / position: Defaults for object-fit and object-position on replaced elements (img, video).
_groups.Core tokens | Scrollbar: Custom scrollbar thumb and track colors.
_groups.Core tokens | Color scheme: Preferred color-scheme hint sent to the browser (light / dark / normal).
_groups.Core tokens | Code text: Foreground color for inline code and pre-formatted text.
_groups.Palette tokens | action: Full numeric shade scale (50–950) plus alpha variants (a5–a95) for the action palette. Use via --sf-color-action-* for component-level overrides.
_groups.Palette tokens | base: Full numeric shade scale plus alpha variants for the base palette.
_groups.Palette tokens | primary: Full numeric shade scale plus alpha variants for the primary palette.
_groups.Palette tokens | secondary: Full numeric shade scale plus alpha variants for the secondary palette.
_groups.Palette tokens | neutral: Full numeric shade scale plus alpha variants for the neutral palette.
_groups.Palette tokens | tertiary: Full numeric shade scale plus alpha variants for the tertiary palette.
_groups.Layout tokens | Spacing aliases: Contextual aliases mapping layout-specific use-cases to the global spacing scale.
_groups.Layout tokens | Bento grid: Configuration tokens for the bento-grid layout primitive.
_groups.Layout tokens | Grid (auto-fill, breakpo: Configuration tokens for the responsive auto-fill grid. Set --sf-grid-min to control the minimum column width.
_groups.Layout tokens | Sidebar: Configuration tokens for the sidebar layout pattern (main content + fixed-width aside).
_groups.Layout tokens | Stack: Gap for the stack layout primitive (vertically stacked blocks).
_groups.Layout tokens | Cluster: Configuration tokens for the cluster layout (inline wrapped items).
_groups.Layout tokens | Switcher: Configuration tokens for the switcher layout (horizontal → vertical breakpoint).
_groups.Layout tokens | Reel: Configuration tokens for the reel layout (horizontal scroll container).
_groups.Layout tokens | Center: Max-width and gutter for the center layout primitive.
_groups.Layout tokens | Cover: Min-height and padding for the full-viewport cover layout.
_groups.Layout tokens | Alternate (zigzag): Gap tokens for the alternating content/media (zigzag) layout.
_groups.Layout tokens | Frame: Aspect ratio for the frame layout primitive (media container).
_groups.Layout tokens | Gap: Shared gap token consumed by multiple layout primitives.
_groups.Layout tokens | Equal columns (fixed, no: Configuration for a fixed N-column equal-width layout.
_groups.Layout tokens | Icon (boxed variant): Background, border, and padding for boxed icon containers.
_groups.Layout tokens | Box: Border, background, and padding tokens for the box layout primitive.
_groups.Layout tokens | Content grid (breakout p: Breakout width and content width for the content-grid pattern (full-bleed breakouts inside a constrained column).
_groups.Layout tokens | Imposter (centered absol: Margin for the imposter layout (centered fixed/absolute overlay).
_groups.Layout tokens | Prose: Max-width for the prose layout primitive (long-form reading column).
_groups.Macro tokens | Flow: Vertical rhythm gap between flow children (margin-block-start on all but the first child).
_groups.Macro tokens | Prose: Fine-grained typography controls for the .prose macro (margins, blockquote style, link decoration, etc.).
_groups.Macro tokens | Scrim: Gradient scrim configuration (direction, size, color) for overlaying images with readable text.
_groups.Macro tokens | Scroll shadow / overflow: Size of the scroll-shadow fade effect on overflowing containers.
_groups.Macro tokens | Content visibility: intrinsic-size hint for content-visibility: auto (lazy off-screen rendering).
_groups.Macro tokens | Line clamp: Number of lines before text truncates with an ellipsis.
_groups.Component tokens | BUTTON TOKENS: Padding and radius tokens that control button geometry. Override these to give buttons a distinct visual language from form fields.
_groups.Component tokens | FIELD TOKENS: Padding and radius tokens that control form field geometry. Override these to give inputs a distinct visual language from buttons.
_groups.Core tokens | Link alpha token: Semi-transparent underline color token used to tint the link underline independently from the link text color.
_groups.Core tokens | Selection & mark: Background and text colors for browser text selections and <mark> highlights. Adapts automatically in dark mode.
_groups.Core tokens | FLUID SCALE ENGINE: Generative inputs that drive all fluid clamp() type and spacing scales at runtime. Override the base, ratio, and viewport range tokens to globally rescale the entire system without touching individual step tokens.
_groups.Core tokens | Heading line-length constr: Per-heading max-inline-size caps. Default none (unconstrained). Set to a ch value to cap a heading level's line length for readability on wide screens.
_groups.Core tokens | LumLocker: OKLCH lightness lock for the data-lumlocker attribute. Pins surface brightness to a fixed L value — useful for always-dark or always-light sections that must stay stable while the rest of the page switches color-scheme.
_groups.Core tokens | Mask scrim: Edge-fade stop positions for the scroll-shadow mask effect on overflowing containers. Expressed as percentages or lengths; consumed by mask-image gradients.
_groups.Core tokens | Scale multipliers: Global proportional multipliers for the four main design axes (type, space, radius, motion). Adjusting one multiplier uniformly scales every clamp() value in that dimension.
_groups.Core tokens | Print: Page-layout tokens for printed output: paper size, margins, and base font size. These correspond to the @page values in core/print.css.
_groups.Core tokens | Full/pill: Topological constants for rounding: full (50%) for circles, pill (9999px) for tags. Also provides --sf-radius-outer, a concentric-radius helper for outer containers wrapping inner rounded elements.
_groups.Core tokens | Scroll-driven animation ra: animation-range start and end positions for scroll-driven entrance effects (animation-timeline: view()). Controls how far into the viewport an element must scroll before its entrance animation starts and ends.
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow ramp (box-shadow, t: Elevation box-shadow ramp from xs to 2xl plus inner, text-shadow, and drop-shadow presets. All opacity values scale with --sf-shadow-strength so dark-mode contrast boost is automatic.
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow glow: Glow box-shadow shorthand for decorative glow effects. Uses --sf-shadow-glow-color as the tint and adapts opacity with --sf-shadow-strength.
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow glow color: Tint color used by --sf-shadow-glow. Override to retint glows; opacity and dark-mode adaptation are handled automatically.
_groups.Core tokens | Shadow strength: Base opacity for the shadow ramp. --sf-shadow-lightness controls tonal density; --sf-shadow-strength is auto-boosted in dark mode so elevation reads on dark surfaces.
_groups.Layout tokens | Equal columns (intrinsic: Minimum column-width tokens for the equal-columns layout. The RAM pattern (repeat(auto-fill, minmax(min, 1fr))) auto-fills columns; the actual count emerges from the minimum width and available space.
_groups.Layout tokens | Shared spacing aliases: Layout-scoped semantic aliases for spacing patterns shared across multiple layout primitives.
_groups.Macro tokens | Surface color: Input color for the generic .sf-surface macro. Set any color value; the macro derives the background, auto-contrast foreground, and contextual token set from it.
_groups.Macro tokens | Truncate: Truncation suffix character for the .sf-truncate line-clamp macro. Default is the ellipsis character (…).
_groups.Palette tokens | Palette shade mix perce: color-mix() interpolation weights for each numeric shade step (50–950). Override to reshape the tint/shade curve without rewriting individual palette tokens.
_groups.Sizes-extended tokens | Spacing bridges: Fluid clamp() values that interpolate between any two spacing scale steps (--sf-space-{larger}-to-{smaller}). Use to set a gap that smoothly narrows as the viewport shrinks, without a breakpoint.
_groups.Sizes-extended tokens | Text bridges: Fluid clamp() values interpolating between any two font-size scale steps (--sf-text-{larger}-to-{smaller}). Use for headings or labels that need to transition smoothly between two named type sizes.
_groups.Sizes-extended tokens | Per-text-size su: Fine-grained typography sub-property tokens for each text scale step: font-weight, letter-spacing, line-height, and max-width. Tune a specific size's typographic properties without affecting others.

tokens.--sf-color-action: Primary interactive color. Applied to filled buttons, active indicators, and brand accent surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-base: Secondary interactive color for supporting actions and secondary buttons.
tokens.--sf-color-neutral: Neutral interactive color for low-emphasis actions and tertiary buttons.
tokens.--sf-color-primary: Raw primary palette token aliased from the action role by default. Override to decouple primary from action.
tokens.--sf-color-secondary: Raw secondary palette token for the secondary brand color.
tokens.--sf-color-tertiary: Raw tertiary palette token for the third brand color.
tokens.--sf-color-danger: Destructive / danger state color. Used for delete actions, error alerts, and critical warnings.
tokens.--sf-color-error: Form validation error color. Typically same hue as danger but can be tuned independently.
tokens.--sf-color-warning: Warning / caution color for non-critical alerts and degraded-state indicators.
tokens.--sf-color-success: Positive / success color for confirmation messages and completed-state indicators.
tokens.--sf-color-info: Informational color for neutral tips, hints, and non-urgent notices.
tokens.--sf-color-surface: Elevated surface color (e.g. card background one step above page background).
tokens.--sf-color-text: Primary text color. Contrasts against --sf-color-bg for body copy.
tokens.--sf-color-heading: Heading text color. Slightly stronger contrast than body text for visual hierarchy.
tokens.--sf-color-text--secondary: De-emphasised secondary text (captions, labels, supporting copy).
tokens.--sf-color-text--muted: Muted text for metadata, timestamps, and low-priority annotations.
tokens.--sf-color-text--disabled: Text color for disabled UI elements. Intentionally low contrast.
tokens.--sf-color-text--placeholder: Placeholder text color for inputs and textareas.
tokens.--sf-color-text--inverse: Text color for use on dark/inverted backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-bg: Base page / component background. The canvas all other surfaces layer on top of.
tokens.--sf-color-inset: Slightly inset surface for nested areas — inputs, code blocks, sidebar panels.
tokens.--sf-color-inverse: Inverted (dark-on-light / light-on-dark) surface for high-contrast banners or tooltips.
tokens.--sf-color-raised: Elevated card surface that floats above the page background.
tokens.--sf-color-overlay: Overlay surface for floating panels, sheets, and modals.
tokens.--sf-color-border: Default border for dividers and component edges.
tokens.--sf-color-border--strong: Stronger border for visually prominent edges and active outlines.
tokens.--sf-color-border--subtle: Low-contrast border for subtle separation without strong visual weight.
tokens.--sf-color-border--disabled: Semi-transparent border for disabled element edges.
tokens.--sf-color-border--translucent: Translucent border for glass-morphism and frosted surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-link--disabled: Disabled link color (low contrast, no interaction).
tokens.--sf-link-underline-offset: Vertical offset of the link underline from the text baseline.
tokens.--sf-link-underline-thickness: Stroke width of the link underline.
tokens.--sf-color-selection-text: Text color inside browser text selections.
tokens.--sf-color-bg--hover: Background tint for hovered interactive elements (rows, list items, etc.).
tokens.--sf-color-bg--focus: Background tint for focused interactive elements.
tokens.--sf-color-bg--active: Background tint for pressed/active interactive elements.
tokens.--sf-color-bg--selected: Background for selected items (checked rows, active nav links).
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-action: Accessible foreground color for text on action-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-base: Accessible foreground for text on base-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-danger: Accessible foreground for text on danger-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-error: Accessible foreground for text on error-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-info: Accessible foreground for text on info-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-success: Accessible foreground for text on success-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-warning: Accessible foreground for text on warning-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-light: OKLCH lightness source for the action color. Animate this to smoothly transition between light and dark brand themes.
tokens.--sf-color-base-light: OKLCH lightness source for the base color.
tokens.--sf-color-neutral-light: OKLCH lightness source for the neutral color.
tokens.--sf-color-primary-light: OKLCH lightness source for the primary color.
tokens.--sf-color-secondary-light: OKLCH lightness source for the secondary color.
tokens.--sf-color-tertiary-light: OKLCH lightness source for the tertiary color.
tokens.--sf-color-danger-light: OKLCH lightness source for the danger status color.
tokens.--sf-color-error-light: OKLCH lightness source for the error status color.
tokens.--sf-color-info-light: OKLCH lightness source for the info status color.
tokens.--sf-color-success-light: OKLCH lightness source for the success status color.
tokens.--sf-color-warning-light: OKLCH lightness source for the warning status color.
tokens.--sf-color-danger-subtle: Light danger tint for error row backgrounds and alert container fills.
tokens.--sf-color-danger-muted: Medium danger fill for icon backgrounds and badge fills.
tokens.--sf-color-danger-strong: High-contrast danger color for alert body text and icons.
tokens.--sf-color-error-subtle: Light error tint for validation field backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-error-muted: Medium error fill for icons and inline badges.
tokens.--sf-color-error-strong: High-contrast error color for validation message text.
tokens.--sf-color-warning-subtle: Light warning tint for warning notification backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-warning-muted: Medium warning fill for icons and caution chips.
tokens.--sf-color-warning-strong: High-contrast warning color for caution text.
tokens.--sf-color-success-subtle: Light success tint for confirmation backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-success-muted: Medium success fill for success icons and status chips.
tokens.--sf-color-success-strong: High-contrast success color for confirmation message text.
tokens.--sf-color-info-subtle: Light info tint for informational note backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-info-muted: Medium info fill for info icons and hint chips.
tokens.--sf-color-info-strong: High-contrast info color for hint body text.
tokens.--sf-color-action-subtle: Lightest action tint — selected rows, active nav, chips.
tokens.--sf-color-action-muted: Medium action fill — outlined button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-darker: Deep action shade for high-contrast contexts.
tokens.--sf-color-action-lighter: Light action shade for soft accents.
tokens.--sf-color-action-ghost: Near-transparent action tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-superdark: Near-black action shade for maximum contrast on light surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-action-superlight: Near-white action shade for maximum contrast on dark surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-base-ghost: Near-transparent base tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-selection-bg: Background color applied to browser text selections.
tokens.--sf-color-code-text: Text color for inline code and monospace preformatted text.
tokens.--sf-color-scheme: Preferred color scheme hint (light / dark / normal). Sent to the browser to influence UA chrome styling.
tokens.--sf-caret-color: Cursor caret color inside text inputs and contenteditable elements.
tokens.--sf-focus-ring-color: Color of the keyboard focus ring. Ensure sufficient contrast against all background surfaces.
tokens.--sf-focus-ring-width: Stroke width of the focus ring outline.
tokens.--sf-focus-ring-offset: Gap between the element edge and the focus ring.
tokens.--sf-focus-ring-style: Border style of the focus ring (solid, dashed, dotted).
tokens.--sf-touch-target: Minimum touch-target size for interactive elements per WCAG 2.5.5.
tokens.--sf-header-height: Total height of the sticky page header. Used by --sf-sticky-offset to prevent content from hiding under it.
tokens.--sf-sticky-offset: top offset for position: sticky elements, accounting for the header height.
tokens.--sf-space-none: Zero spacing. Explicit alias for clarity in utility classes.
tokens.--sf-space-px: 1px spacing. Hairline offset for fine adjustments.
tokens.--sf-space-2xs: 4px-equivalent spacing. Tight inline gaps, icon-to-text padding.
tokens.--sf-space-xs: 8px-equivalent spacing. Compact list rows, tab padding.
tokens.--sf-space-s: 12px-equivalent spacing. Form field inner padding, narrow gaps.
tokens.--sf-space-xl: 32px-equivalent spacing. Feature row gaps, generous section padding.
tokens.--sf-space-gutter: Horizontal gutter / margin for page-edge spacing.
tokens.--sf-component-pad: Standard inner padding for interactive components (buttons, form inputs, chips).
tokens.--sf-content-gap: Gap between stacked content blocks within a section.
tokens.--sf-font-body: Font family stack for body text. Override to set your primary typeface.
tokens.--sf-font-display: Font family for display/marketing text. Override for large headline typefaces.
tokens.--sf-font-heading: Font family for headings. Defaults to display if not overridden separately.
tokens.--sf-font-mono: Monospace font family for code, pre, and kbd elements.
tokens.--sf-font-geometric: Geometric sans-serif slot — circular letterforms for brand alternates.
tokens.--sf-font-humanist: Humanist sans-serif slot — warm, readable alternate typeface.
tokens.--sf-font-slab: Slab-serif slot for editorial or display headings.
tokens.--sf-font-weight-body: Font weight for body text (typically 400 / normal).
tokens.--sf-font-weight-semibold: Semibold weight (600). Common for labels and subheadings.
tokens.--sf-font-weight-medium: Medium weight (500). Subtle emphasis without full bold.
tokens.--sf-font-weight-light: Light weight (300). Use sparingly — check contrast at small sizes.
tokens.--sf-current-font-weight: Inherits the current font-weight from context. Useful as a reset.
tokens.--sf-text-2xs: Extra-extra-small font size (~11px). Fine print, badges.
tokens.--sf-text-xs: Extra-small font size (~12px). Labels, captions, metadata.
tokens.--sf-text-s: Small font size (~14px). Secondary content, UI annotations.
tokens.--sf-text-m: Medium / base font size (~16px). Typical body text.
tokens.--sf-text-l: Large font size (~18px). Lead paragraphs, prominent labels.
tokens.--sf-text-xl: Extra-large font size (~20px). Sub-headings, callout text.
tokens.--sf-text-display-s: Small display font size (~42px). Hero sub-headings.
tokens.--sf-text-display-m: Medium display font size (~54px). Hero headings.
tokens.--sf-text-display-l: Large display font size (~68px+). Oversized hero text.
tokens.--sf-leading-tight: Tight line height (~1.2). Use for large display headings.
tokens.--sf-leading-snug: Snug line height (~1.35). Use for sub-headings.
tokens.--sf-leading-normal: Normal line height (~1.5). Default for body text.
tokens.--sf-leading-relaxed: Relaxed line height (~1.65). Long-form reading text.
tokens.--sf-tracking-tight: Tight letter-spacing (slightly negative). Suitable for large headings.
tokens.--sf-tracking-normal: Normal letter-spacing (0). Default for body text.
tokens.--sf-tracking-wide: Wide letter-spacing. Use for small-caps labels.
tokens.--sf-tracking-wider: Wider letter-spacing for strongly spaced labels.
tokens.--sf-font-numeric: font-variant-numeric shorthand (e.g. tabular-nums) for aligned numeric data.
tokens.--sf-radius-2xs: Extra-extra-small radius (~1px). Minimal rounding for very tight UI elements.
tokens.--sf-radius-xs: Hairline radius (~2px). Subtle rounding for tight components.
tokens.--sf-radius-s: Small radius (~4px). Badges, chips, small buttons.
tokens.--sf-radius-m: Medium radius (~6–8px). Default — inputs, standard buttons, cards.
tokens.--sf-radius-xl: Extra-large radius (~16px). Prominent cards and feature blocks.
tokens.--sf-radius-full: Full rounding (50%). For circular elements like avatars.
tokens.--sf-radius-pill: Pill rounding (9999px). Tags, toggle pills, status badges.
tokens.--sf-border: Default border shorthand (width + solid + color). Apply directly to border property.
tokens.--sf-border-width-2: Medium 2px border width. Common for focus outlines.
tokens.--sf-border-width-4: Extra-thick 4px border width for decorative borders.
tokens.--sf-duration-instant: Near-instant duration (~50ms). Micro-interactions and cursor-follow effects.
tokens.--sf-duration-fast: Fast duration (~100ms). Hover transitions, tooltip appear.
tokens.--sf-duration-normal: Normal duration (~200ms). Default for most transitions.
tokens.--sf-ease-linear: Linear easing. Use for progress indicators and spinner rotations.
tokens.--sf-ease-in: Accelerating easing. Use for elements leaving the viewport.
tokens.--sf-ease-out: Decelerating easing. Use for elements entering the viewport.
tokens.--sf-ease-in-out: Symmetric easing. Use for elements that move within the viewport.
tokens.--sf-ease-overshoot: Subtle overshoot easing. Softer spring effect.
tokens.--sf-transition-colors: Transition shorthand for color-related properties (color, background, border-color).
tokens.--sf-transition-enter: Enter-phase transition (ease-out). Use on elements appearing in the viewport.
tokens.--sf-transition-exit: Exit-phase transition (ease-in). Use on elements leaving the viewport.
tokens.--sf-transition-overlay: Transition shorthand for overlay fades (opacity + visibility).
tokens.--sf-icon-s: Small icon size (~16px). Dense UI chrome.
tokens.--sf-icon-m: Medium icon size (~20px). Default for inline and button icons.
tokens.--sf-icon-l: Large icon size (~24px). Standalone icon buttons.
tokens.--sf-icon-2xl: 2× large icon size (~40px+). Hero or onboarding icons.
tokens.--sf-size-s: Small UI component height (~28px). Compact buttons and input variants.
tokens.--sf-size-m: Medium UI component height (~36px). Default size for buttons and inputs.
tokens.--sf-size-l: Large UI component height (~44px). Touch-friendly interactive elements.
tokens.--sf-container-narrow: Narrow content max-width — ideal for article body and blog posts (~65ch).
tokens.--sf-container-wide: Wide container for marketing / dashboard layouts (~1440px).
tokens.--sf-container-full: Full-width container — removes the max-width constraint.
tokens.--sf-z-below: Z-index below stacking context base. For decorative pseudo-elements.
tokens.--sf-z-base: Base stacking level (1). Establishes a stacking context without elevation.
tokens.--sf-z-dropdown: Z-index for dropdown menus and select popups.
tokens.--sf-z-sticky: Z-index for position: sticky elements (navbars, table headers).
tokens.--sf-section-pad: Default vertical padding for full-width page sections.
tokens.--sf-section-pad--2xl: 2× large section vertical padding for hero areas.
tokens.--sf-ratio-3-2: 3:2 aspect ratio. Common for landscape photography.
tokens.--sf-state-pending-opacity: Opacity for pending / loading state elements.
tokens.--sf-stack-gap: Vertical gap between stacked block-level elements in the stack layout.
tokens.--sf-cluster-gap: Gap between wrapped inline items in the cluster layout.
tokens.--sf-cluster-align: Vertical alignment of cluster items (align-items value).
tokens.--sf-cluster-justify: Horizontal justification of the cluster (justify-content value).
tokens.--sf-sidebar-width: Preferred width of the sidebar column.
tokens.--sf-sidebar-min-width: Minimum sidebar width before the layout collapses to stacking.
tokens.--sf-sidebar-gap: Gap between sidebar and main content column.
tokens.--sf-grid-min: Minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.
tokens.--sf-grid-min-2xl: Minimum column width at the 2× breakpoint.
tokens.--sf-switcher-threshold: Inline-size threshold below which the switcher flips from horizontal to vertical.
tokens.--sf-reel-gap: Gap between items in the horizontal reel.
tokens.--sf-reel-height: Fixed height of the reel container.
tokens.--sf-reel-item-width: Width of each item in the reel.
tokens.--sf-center-max: Maximum width for the center layout.
tokens.--sf-center-gutter: Minimum side gutter for the center layout.
tokens.--sf-cover-min-height: Minimum height of the cover layout (typically 100svh).
tokens.--sf-cover-padding: Inner padding for the cover layout.
tokens.--sf-alternate-gap: Gap between items in the alternating zigzag layout.
tokens.--sf-alternate-inner-gap: Gap between content and media within each zigzag item.
tokens.--sf-bento-cols-default: Default column count for the bento grid.
tokens.--sf-bento-row-compact: Row height for compact-variant bento items.
tokens.--sf-frame-ratio: Aspect ratio for the frame (media container) layout.
tokens.--sf-gap-size: Shared base gap consumed by multiple layout primitives.
tokens.--sf-imposter-margin: Margin between the imposter overlay and the viewport edges.
tokens.--sf-prose-paragraph: Max width of prose paragraphs (layout token for the prose layout).
tokens.--sf-space-content: Semantic alias for the content-column horizontal gap.
tokens.--sf-space-gap: Semantic alias for the default layout gap.
tokens.--sf-breakout-width: Width of full-bleed breakout elements inside a content grid.
tokens.--sf-content-width: Max-width of the main content column in a content grid.
tokens.--sf-box-padding: Inner padding for the box layout primitive.
tokens.--sf-box-border-width: Border width for the box layout primitive.
tokens.--sf-box-border-color: Border color for the box layout primitive.
tokens.--sf-icon-box-bg: Background color for boxed icon containers.
tokens.--sf-flow-space: Margin-block-start applied to all flow children except the first.
tokens.--sf-aspect: Aspect ratio value for the .aspect-ratio macro.
tokens.--sf-line-clamp: Number of visible lines before text is clipped with an ellipsis.
tokens.--sf-content-intrinsic-size: Intrinsic-size hint for content-visibility: auto (prevents layout shift on first reveal).
tokens.--sf-scroll-shadow-size: Size of the scroll-shadow fade effect on overflowing containers.
tokens.--sf-prose-block-margin: Block margin between prose elements (h2, p, ul, etc.).
tokens.--sf-prose-blockquote-border: Left border style for blockquotes inside prose.
tokens.--sf-prose-blockquote-padding: Inner padding for blockquotes inside prose.
tokens.--sf-scrim-color: Base color of the gradient scrim overlay.
tokens.--sf-scrim-direction: Direction of the scrim gradient (to bottom, to top, etc.).
tokens.--sf-scrim-gradient: Full gradient shorthand for the scrim. Override to customise the fade.
tokens.--sf-object-fit: Default object-fit value for replaced elements (img, video).
tokens.--sf-scrollbar-thumb: Color of the custom scrollbar thumb.
tokens.--sf-scrollbar-track: Color of the custom scrollbar track.
tokens.--sf-border-style: Global border-style default applied across all border tokens.
tokens.--sf-shadow-glow: Glow box-shadow shorthand for decorative glow effects.
tokens.--sf-color-dim: Backdrop overlay color for modals, drawers, and lightboxes.
tokens.--sf-animation-blink: Blinking visibility loop. Use for cursor indicators or critical attention cues. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
tokens.--sf-animation-color-pulse: Pulsing color loop. Use for live-status badges (recording, live). Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
tokens.--sf-animation-delay-1: Shortest stagger delay. Apply to the first element in a sequentially animated group.
tokens.--sf-animation-delay-5: Longest stagger delay. Apply to the last element in a sequentially animated group.
tokens.--sf-animation-fade-in: Fade-in entrance animation shorthand. Use directly as animation property value.
tokens.--sf-animation-float: Gentle floating / levitating loop. Use for hero illustrations or floating UI elements. Decorative — disable for prefers-reduced-motion.
tokens.--sf-animation-ping: Expanding ping / ripple loop. Use for notification badges and live-indicator dots.
tokens.--sf-animation-scale-down: Scale-down exit animation. Pairs with --sf-animation-scale-up for enter/leave transitions.
tokens.--sf-animation-scale-up: Scale-up entrance animation. Use for modals, popovers, and tooltips appearing.
tokens.--sf-animation-shimmer: Shimmer / skeleton-loading sweep. Apply on placeholder elements while content loads.
tokens.--sf-animation-slide-in-down: Slide-in from above. Use for dropdown menus and top-attached sheets.
tokens.--sf-animation-slide-in-left: Slide-in from the left. Use for left-side drawers and navigation panels.
tokens.--sf-animation-slide-in-right: Slide-in from the right. Use for right-side drawers and detail panels.
tokens.--sf-animation-slide-in-up: Slide-in from below. Use for bottom sheets, toasts, and floating action buttons.
tokens.--sf-animation-spin: Continuous rotation loop. Use for loading spinners and progress indicators.
tokens.--sf-bento-row-default: Default row height for standard bento grid cells.
tokens.--sf-bento-row-tall: Tall row height for visually prominent or hero bento cells.
tokens.--sf-body-color: Text color for body copy. Alias of --sf-color-text. Override here to deviate body text from the global text color.
tokens.--sf-body-em-style: font-style for <em> inside body text (italic by default). Override to suppress italics if your typeface has no italic variant.
tokens.--sf-body-font-family: Font family for body text. Alias of --sf-font-body.
tokens.--sf-body-font-size: Base font size for body paragraphs. Alias of --sf-text-m.
tokens.--sf-body-font-weight: Font weight for body text. Alias of --sf-font-weight-body.
tokens.--sf-body-line-height: Line height for body paragraphs. Alias of --sf-leading-normal.
tokens.--sf-body-strong-weight: Font weight for <strong> inside body text. Override to choose a specific weight instead of inheriting bold.
tokens.--sf-body-text-wrap: text-wrap mode for body paragraphs. 'pretty' prevents orphaned last words; 'balance' equalises line lengths.
tokens.--sf-code-font-size: Font size for inline <code> and <pre>. Usually slightly smaller than body text so monospace doesn't feel oversized.
tokens.--sf-h1-letter-spacing: Letter-spacing for <h1>. Typically slightly negative at large sizes.
tokens.--sf-h1-line-height: Line height for <h1>. Tighter than body to avoid excessive whitespace at large sizes.
tokens.--sf-heading-color: Text color for all headings (h1–h6). Alias of --sf-color-heading.
tokens.--sf-heading-font-family: Font family for all headings. Alias of --sf-font-heading.
tokens.--sf-heading-text-wrap: text-wrap for headings. 'balance' prevents orphaned short last lines in multi-line headings.
tokens.--sf-shadow-none: No box-shadow (resets inherited shadows). Use to explicitly remove elevation.
tokens.--sf-shadow-xs: Extra-small shadow for barely-elevated elements (focused inputs, small chips).
tokens.--sf-shadow-s: Small shadow for chips, tags, and inline elevated surfaces.
tokens.--sf-shadow-m: Medium shadow for cards and content panels.
tokens.--sf-shadow-l: Large shadow for drawers, sidebars, and prominent elevated surfaces.
tokens.--sf-shadow-xl: Extra-large shadow for modals, dialogs, and high-elevation sheets.
tokens.--sf-shadow-2xl: Largest shadow for hero cards, feature highlights, and marketing surfaces.
tokens.--sf-shadow-inner: Inset shadow for pressed states, inset inputs, and recessed surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-action-50: Lightest action tint. Background fill for subtle action-tinted surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-action-100: Very light action shade. Hover fills on white surfaces, badge backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-200: Light action shade. Subtle fills and outlined badge backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-300: Light-mid action shade. Borders on light backgrounds, low-emphasis fills.
tokens.--sf-color-action-400: Mid-light action shade. Disabled state fills, decorative accents.
tokens.--sf-color-action-500: Mid action shade — the 'pure' hue. Accessible on both light and dark backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-600: Mid-dark action shade. Text on light surfaces, icon fills.
tokens.--sf-color-action-700: Dark action shade. Strong text and icon fills on light backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-action-800: Very dark action shade. High-contrast text on white.
tokens.--sf-color-action-900: Near-black action shade. Extreme contrast on white surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-action-950: Darkest action tint. Near-black for dark-theme surface accents.
tokens.--sf-color-action-a5: 5% opacity action tint. Barely-there hover highlight.
tokens.--sf-color-action-a10: 10% opacity action tint. Subtle hover or selected-row background.
tokens.--sf-color-action-a50: 50% opacity action tint. Mid-transparency badge or overlay.
tokens.--sf-color-base-100: Very light base shade. Hover fills, badge backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-base-300: Light-mid base shade. Borders on light backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-base-600: Mid-dark base shade. Text on light surfaces.
tokens.--sf-color-neutral-muted: Muted neutral fill for low-emphasis contexts.
tokens.--sf-color-neutral-darker: Deep neutral shade for high-contrast contexts.
tokens.--sf-color-neutral-ghost: Near-transparent neutral tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-primary-ghost: Near-transparent primary tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-secondary-ghost: Near-transparent secondary tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-tertiary-ghost: Near-transparent tertiary tint for ghost-button hover backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-code-bg: Background for inline <code> elements. Usually a subtle tint of the inset surface.
tokens.--sf-color-link--underline: Color of the link underline decoration. Defaults to a semi-transparent variant of the link color.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-inverse: Accessible foreground for text on inverted (dark-on-light / light-on-dark) backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-neutral: Accessible foreground for text placed on neutral-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-primary: Accessible foreground for text placed on primary-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-secondary: Accessible foreground for text placed on secondary-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-surface: Accessible foreground for text on elevated surface backgrounds (cards, panels).
tokens.--sf-color-text--on-tertiary: Accessible foreground for text placed on tertiary-colored backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-display-l-line-height: Line height for large display text (--sf-text-display-l). Very tight to avoid excessive gaps at oversized sizes.
tokens.--sf-display-m-line-height: Line height for medium display text (--sf-text-display-m).
tokens.--sf-display-s-line-height: Line height for small display text (--sf-text-display-s).
tokens.--sf-divider-width: Stroke width of horizontal and vertical divider rules.
tokens.--sf-drop-shadow-s: Small CSS filter: drop-shadow. Use filter (not box-shadow) for elements with transparent areas — SVGs, PNGs, cutout images.
tokens.--sf-drop-shadow-m: Medium CSS filter: drop-shadow for elevated icons and card thumbnails.
tokens.--sf-drop-shadow-l: Large CSS filter: drop-shadow for prominent illustrated or cut-out elements.
tokens.--sf-text-shadow-none: Removes text-shadow (use to explicitly reset inherited shadows).
tokens.--sf-text-shadow-s: Small text-shadow for subtle depth on display headings.
tokens.--sf-text-shadow-m: Medium text-shadow. Use for text overlaid on images to improve legibility.
tokens.--sf-text-shadow-l: Large text-shadow for high-contrast text over busy or dark image backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-field-required-marker: CSS content value for required-field markers (e.g. " *"). Used by pseudo-elements in the .required utility pattern.
tokens.--sf-gap: Alias for the default layout gap. Do not override directly — adjust --sf-gap-size or the specific layout primitive's gap token.
tokens.--sf-link-external-marker: CSS content value appended to external links (e.g. " ↗"). Used by the .external-link pseudo-element pattern.
tokens.--sf-gradient-brand: Multi-stop brand gradient spanning primary and secondary palette colors. Use for hero backgrounds and brand accents.
tokens.--sf-gradient-fade--b: Fade-to-bottom gradient (transparent → surface). Use to fade content into a background below (infinite scroll fade, content cutoff).
tokens.--sf-gradient-fade--l: Fade-to-left gradient. Use to indicate left-side scrollable overflow.
tokens.--sf-gradient-fade--r: Fade-to-right gradient. Use to indicate right-side scrollable overflow.
tokens.--sf-gradient-fade--t: Fade-to-top gradient (transparent → surface). Use to fade content into a background above.
tokens.--sf-gradient-primary: Gradient using primary palette colors (light to saturated).
tokens.--sf-gradient-surface: Subtle surface-color gradient for depth layering and glass effects.
tokens.--sf-grid-min-xs: Extra-small minimum column width for the auto-fill grid. Use for very compact tile layouts (icon grids).
tokens.--sf-grid-min-s: Small minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.
tokens.--sf-grid-min-m: Medium minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.
tokens.--sf-grid-min-l: Large minimum column width for the auto-fill grid.
tokens.--sf-grid-min-xl: Extra-large minimum column width for the auto-fill grid. Use for wide content cards.
tokens.--sf-icon-box-radius: Border radius for boxed icon containers.
tokens.--sf-prose-figcaption-size: Font size for figure captions inside .prose. Typically smaller than body text.
tokens.--sf-prose-heading-gap: Space between a heading and the content that follows it inside .prose.
tokens.--sf-prose-marker-color: Color of list bullets and ordered-list numbers inside .prose.
tokens.--sf-prose-media-margin: Block margin around images, video, and figures inside .prose.
tokens.--sf-prose-media-radius: Border radius applied to images and media inside .prose.
tokens.--sf-prose-nested-list-gap: Gap between items in nested lists inside .prose.
tokens.--sf-ratio-square: 1:1 square aspect ratio. Use for avatars, icon containers, and square thumbnails.
tokens.--sf-ratio-video: 16:9 widescreen video aspect ratio. Use for video embeds and video-thumbnail containers.
tokens.--sf-scrim-text-shadow: Text-shadow layered over the scrim gradient to ensure legibility for text placed directly on image backgrounds.
tokens.--sf-section-pad--xs: Extra-small vertical section padding for compact in-page modules.
tokens.--sf-section-pad--xl: Extra-large vertical section padding for hero and feature sections.
tokens.--sf-size-xs: Extra-small interactive component height (~24px). For very compact inline elements and micro-controls.
tokens.--sf-size-xl: Extra-large interactive component height (~52px). For oversized or prominently touch-friendly controls.
tokens.--sf-text-2xs-font-weight: Font weight for 2×-extra-small text. Override to deviate from the global weight at this size.
tokens.--sf-text-2xs-max-width: Optimal line length (max-width in ch) for 2×-extra-small text.
tokens.--sf-text-xs-max-width: Optimal line length for extra-small text.
tokens.--sf-text-s-max-width: Optimal line length for small text.
tokens.--sf-text-m-max-width: Optimal reading line length for medium text (~65–75ch).
tokens.--sf-text-l-max-width: Optimal line length for large text.
tokens.--sf-text-xl-max-width: Optimal line length for extra-large text.
tokens.--sf-text-3xl-letter-spacing: Letter-spacing for 3×-large text. Typically negative to tighten large headings.
tokens.--sf-section-scale: Global multiplier applied to every --sf-section-pad--* size — one dial re-rhythms all section padding (default 1).
tokens.--sf-leading-taper: Progressive leading tightener: each step up the type scale subtracts step-index × taper from its per-size line-height token (tokens.sizes-extended). Default 0 keeps the curated defaults.
tokens.--sf-surface-color: Input for the generic .sf-surface macro. Set any color (including palette shades); the macro derives background, auto-contrast foreground, and the contextual token set from it.
tokens.--sf-border-scale: Global border-width multiplier. Set to 0 for borderless UI; 0.5 for hairline-only; 2 to double all border widths across the system.
tokens.--sf-button-radius: Border radius for buttons. Defaults to --sf-radius-m; override to fully pill-round or square all buttons at once.
tokens.--sf-color-action-dark: Registered <color> dark counterpart of --sf-color-action. Enables smooth CSS transitions when toggling between light and dark mode; without <color> registration the browser cannot interpolate and transitions snap at 50%.
tokens.--sf-equal-min-col: Minimum column width for the default auto-fill equal-columns layout. Columns fill the row until this width is reached, then wrap to the next line.
tokens.--sf-equal-min-col-2: Minimum column width for the 2-column equal preset.
tokens.--sf-equal-min-col-3: Minimum column width for the 3-column equal preset.
tokens.--sf-equal-min-col-4: Minimum column width for the 4-column equal preset.
tokens.--sf-equal-min-col-6: Minimum column width for the 6-column equal preset.
tokens.--sf-field-padding-block: Vertical (block) inner padding for form field inputs.
tokens.--sf-field-padding-inline: Horizontal (inline) inner padding for form field inputs.
tokens.--sf-field-radius: Border radius for form field inputs. Defaults to --sf-radius-m; override to reshape all inputs at once.
tokens.--sf-gutter-width: Horizontal gutter consumed by --sf-space-gutter. Set this to control the page-edge margin uniformly across all responsive breakpoints.
tokens.--sf-h1-max-width: Max-inline-size cap for <h1>. Default none (unconstrained). Set to a ch value (e.g. 20ch) to prevent wide headings from spanning the full column on large screens.
tokens.--sf-shadow-lightness: OKLCH lightness component of the shadow color. Lower = denser-looking shadows. Tune this independently of --sf-shadow-strength to control tonal weight without affecting opacity.
tokens.--sf-transition-form-field: Transition shorthand optimised for form fields: color and background at normal pace so label color shifts feel natural; border, shadow, and opacity at fast pace so focus rings appear crisply.
